name: improve-prompt
description: Review and rewrite prompts, system prompts, agent instructions, CLAUDE.md files, and Claude Code skills against Anthropic's prompt-engineering guidance and the Karpathy coding-behaviour principles. Diagnoses the artifact with a structured rubric (clarity, examples, XML structure, output format, hallucination guards, consistency, guardrails, token weight, and — for skills — trigger description quality and progressive disclosure), then delivers a surgical rewrite with per-change rationale. Bundles the full Anthropic prompting docs (best practices, Opus 4.8 guide, guardrail guides, four production use-case guides) and Karpathy guidelines as reference material it reads on demand.
